summary.authoritative_rule: a 5min branch is only worth opening if the exact retained override sessions have concrete nonempty support, not just abstract provider availability

triage_rows.rationale: the retained override sessions should only open a 5min line if the exact manifest is backfillable
the existing minute-data gate remains the primary governance layer regardless of 5min audit outcome

interpretation: V1.31N turns the raw 5-minute feasibility check into a go/no-go direction.
It is intentionally narrow: the question is not whether 5-minute data exists in general, but whether it exists for the exact governance-retained override sessions.
